dataset.title: Palmer Penguins Morphology
dataset.source: Kristen Gorman and Palmer Station LTER, 2007-2009
dataset.sampling_strategy: No sampling; all 344 rows are represented. PCA geometry uses the 342 rows with complete numeric morphology.
